prompt: A serene East Asian-inspired fantasy portrait of a young woman with flowing silver hair adorned with delicate cherry blossom petals, wearing an elegant layered kimono in soft lavender and pale gold with intricate crane embroidery. She stands in a misty bamboo forest at dawn, soft golden light filtering through the leaves, holding a glowing paper lantern. Ethereal, dreamy atmosphere, highly detailed fabric textures, gentle bokeh background, cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic yet painterly style, reminiscent of Studio Ghibli meets modern fantasy illustration.
